ssmcontacts.plan.stage.CfnAbout: A set amount of time that an escalation plan or engagement plan engages the specified contacts or contact methods.

ssmcontacts.plan.stage.DurationInMinutes.Description: The time to wait until beginning the next stage. The duration can only be set to 0 if a target is specified.

ssmcontacts.plan.stage.Targets.Description: The contacts or contact methods that the escalation plan or engagement plan is engaging.
